requirement: Trade correction, order throttling, tiered tick tables, IOC/FOK enforcement

tasks.title: Trade correction + tiered tick tables + IOC/FOK types + throttle types
tasks.description:
Add types and stores for trade corrections, tiered tick tables, order throttling, and IOC/FOK enforcement.

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go:

Part A — Trade correction:
- TradeCorrection struct: ID, TradeID, Action (BUST/CORRECT/REINSTATE), Reason, OriginalPrice float64, OriginalQuantity int, CorrectedPrice float64, CorrectedQuantity int, ActorID, Timestamp — json tags
- Add TradeStatus field to SecurityTrade if not present: Status string (TRADE_ACTIVE/TRADE_BUSTED/TRADE_CORRECTED)

Part B — Tiered tick table:
- TickTier struct: MinPrice float64, MaxPrice float64, TickSize float64 — json tags
- TickTable struct: InstrumentID string, Tiers []TickTier — json tags

Part C — Order throttle:
- ThrottleConfig struct: FirmID string, MaxOrdersPerSecond int, CurrentCount int, WindowStart time.Time

Part D — IOC/FOK constants (verify TimeInForce already has IOC, FOK):
- Ensure TIF_IOC and TIF_FOK constants exist alongside TIF_GTC, TIF_DAY, TIF_GTD

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go:
- TradeCorrectionStore interface: Create(*TradeCorrection) error, ListByTrade(tradeID string) ([]TradeCorrection, error)
- TickTableStore interface: Get(instrumentID string) (*TickTable, error), Set(*TickTable) error, Delete(instrumentID string) error
- ThrottleStore interface: CheckAndIncrement(firmID string, maxPerSecond int) (bool, error) — returns true if under limit
- InMemory implementations for all three

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Engine: tiered tick validation + IOC/FOK + throttle check
tasks.description:
Wire tiered tick tables, IOC/FOK enforcement, and order throttling into the matching engine.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md for types.
Read src/securities-service/internal/engine/engine.go for MatchOrder.
Read src/securities-service/internal/server/handlers_order.go for order submission.

Part A — Tiered tick validation (new: src/securities-service/internal/engine/tick_table.go):
- ValidateTickSize(price float64, tickTable *TickTable) error
  - Find the tier where MinPrice <= price < MaxPrice
  - Check: math.Remainder(price, tier.TickSize) within 1e-9 epsilon
  - If no tier matches, use instrument's default tick_size
  - Return error 'price X must be a multiple of tick_size Y (tier: Z-W)'
- Wire into handleSubmitOrder: before existing tick_size check, try tiered validation first

Part B — IOC/FOK enforcement (modify engine.go MatchOrder):
- After matching completes, check order's TimeInForce:
  - IOC: if order has remaining quantity (not fully filled), cancel the remainder immediately. Set status to PARTIALLY_FILLED or CANCELLED.
  - FOK: before matching, check if total available resting volume >= order quantity. If not, reject entire order with 422 'FOK order cannot be fully filled'. If yes, proceed with matching.
- These only apply to incoming orders, not resting orders.

Part C — Order throttle (modify handlers_order.go):
- Before processing order submission, call throttleStore.CheckAndIncrement(participantID, maxPerSecond)
- If over limit: return 429 {error: {code: 'THROTTLED', message: 'rate limit exceeded: max N orders/sec'}}
- Default maxPerSecond: 100 (configurable per firm via ThrottleConfig)

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Trade correction handlers + tick table + throttle endpoints + gateway
tasks.description:
Add HTTP endpoints for trade corrections, tick tables, throttle config.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md, T2.md.

Part A — Trade correction handlers (new: handlers_trade.go):
- GET /api/v1/securities/trades — list trades
- GET /api/v1/securities/trades/{id} — get trade
- POST /api/v1/securities/trades/{id}/bust — bust trade (validate: reason required, trade must be ACTIVE)
  - Mark trade as BUSTED, reverse positions, create TradeCorrection audit record
- POST /api/v1/securities/trades/{id}/correct — correct trade (validate: new price/qty, reason)
  - Update trade, adjust positions, create TradeCorrection audit record
- POST /api/v1/securities/trades/{id}/reinstate — reinstate busted trade
  - Mark ACTIVE again, re-apply positions, create TradeCorrection audit record
- GET /api/v1/securities/trades/{id}/corrections — list corrections for a trade

Part B — Tick table endpoints (add to handlers_instrument.go or new file):
- GET /api/v1/securities/tick-tables/{instrument_id} — get tick table
- PUT /api/v1/securities/tick-tables/{instrument_id} — set tick table {tiers: [{min_price, max_price, tick_size}]}
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/tick-tables/{instrument_id} — remove (falls back to instrument default)

Part C — Wire into server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for P2a features
tasks.description:
Write tests for trade corrections, tiered tick tables, IOC/FOK, and throttling.

Tests:

1. engine/tick_table_test.go:
- TestTieredTick_ValidPrice — price aligns with tier's tick_size → pass
- TestTieredTick_InvalidPrice — price doesn't align → error with tier info
- TestTieredTick_MultipleTiers — price falls in different tiers, each validated correctly
- TestTieredTick_NoTable — falls back to instrument default tick_size

2. engine_test.go additions:
- TestIOC_PartialFill — IOC order partially fills, remainder cancelled
- TestIOC_FullFill — IOC fully filled, no cancellation
- TestIOC_NoMatch — IOC with no matches, entire order cancelled
- TestFOK_FullFill — FOK fully fillable, executes
- TestFOK_InsufficientLiquidity — FOK rejected, 0 trades

3. store_test.go additions:
- TestTradeCorrectionStore_Create_List
- TestTickTableStore_SetGetDelete
- TestThrottleStore_UnderLimit — returns true
- TestThrottleStore_OverLimit — returns false after N calls
- TestThrottleStore_WindowReset — limit resets after 1 second

Target: 70%+ on new code.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
